articles.author: Adam Clark
articles.title: Why Fox Stock Is Tumbling After $22 Billion Roku Deal - Barron's
articles.description: Fox Corp. has agreed to buy streaming technology maker Roku for $160 a share, or an enterprise value of around $22 billion.
articles.content:
Fox Corp. stock tumbled on Monday after it agreed to buy streaming technology makerRokufor $22 billion for stock and cash.

articles.content:
The new G3 Extreme-based gaming handheld won't be cheap and will be far more expensive than the existing Claw 8 handheld.
